3 ?07 1000011010 4

Constant
3 C 3 1111111111 a mismatch
3 C 3n 0000000000 a mismatch

Unary 0
3 I 0 0111110110 7 mismatch
3 I 0n 1000001001 3 mismatch

Unary 7
3 I 7 1111101100 7 mismatch
3 I 7n 0000010011 3 mismatch

Binary 07
3 AND 07 0111100100 5 mismatch
3 AND 07n 1000011011 5 mismatch
3 OR 07 1111111110 9 mismatch
3 OR 07n 0000000001 1 mismatch
3 XOR 07 1000011010 4 match 1/1
all match XOR 07
3 XOR 07n 0111100101 6 mismatch
3 AND-NOT 07 0000010010 2 mismatch
3 AND-NOT 07n 1111101101 8 mismatch
3 OR-NOT 07 0111110111 8 mismatch

0 I 4

Extending defaults
3 1000011010 4
Starting at I 6 increasing
I 7 1111101100 partial 0111110110 7
left 7
Starting at I 1 decreasing

right 7
Choosing left
3 I 7

Selected
0 I 4
1 I 5
2 I 6
3 XOR 07
4 I 1
5 I 2
6 I 3
7 I 4

Applying to 10100110
Input
I 0 = 1
I 1 = 0
I 2 = 1
I 3 = 0
I 4 = 0
I 5 = 1
I 6 = 1
I 7 = 0
Output
0 I 4 = 0
1 I 5 = 1
2 I 6 = 1
3 XOR 07 = XOR(I 0,I 7) = XOR(1,0) = 1
4 I 1 = 0
5 I 2 = 1
6 I 3 = 0
7 I 4 = 0

\boxed{01110100}
